description_long: This nightstand is a compact, rectangular wooden piece with a rich, dark brown finish and a glossy sheen. The sides and front are adorned with intricate carved patterns, including stylized leaves and heart motifs, giving it a decorative and traditional appearance. The top surface is flat and also features a carved design, making it suitable for placing small items like lamps or books. The nightstand appears to have a single compartment or drawer, with no visible external handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grip. The base is slightly elevated with cut-out feet, adding to its ornate look. Its solid wood construction and detailed craftsmanship make it both functional and visually appealing for indoor or sheltered urban settings.
description: A small, ornate wooden nightstand with a glossy dark brown finish, featuring carved leaf and heart motifs and a flat top surface. It has a single compartment and decorative cut-out feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing a carved leaf motif and a recessed panel, with glossy wood grain and decorative cut-out feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a heart-shaped carved motif and the same glossy finish, with the panel design more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with similar leaf carvings and cut-out feet, maintaining the ornate style.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a heart motif and decorative carvings, matching the design of view 1.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
